calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-11-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Court Trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing as assigned by Dept. 501.
Dept. 514, Judge Gail Dekreon; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA; CSR MITCH LYON #6840
John P. Zanghi, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Swords to Plowshares et al.
Plaintiff's witness and property manager Christina Serrano was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant Thomas Joseph Neal.
At the plaintiff's request, Does 1-10 are dismissed in open court.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at:
1434 Halibut Court, Apt. D2. San Francisco, CA
Rental Agreement is canceled, and Lease is forfeited.
Past-due rent - not requested.
Holdover damages $not requested
Costs $315.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $315.00
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Mar-11-2019 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: JPT: Andrew Westley; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Swords to Plowshares is present. Represented by Christina Sorano.
Attorney John Zanghi for the plaintiff.
Defendant Thomas Neal is present.
Attorney Elisabeth Heck appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of Mar-11-2019 remains on calendar. (501)
